title: Holomap Room
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sithwarend.jpg|thumb|Calixte and Fel at the end of the [[Sith–Imperial War]]]]
The '''Holomap Room''' was a location on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] where [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Morrigan Corde|Nyna Calixte]] watched the [[Battle of Caamas]] from the safety of the room via [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]]. It was here that she was confronted by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] about her role as instigator of the [[Sith–Imperial War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]]
